title: Filing template — field-schema envelope (per-jurisdiction template KB)
description: Generic envelope every filing-template field-schema (FF2-5) conforms to. Describes the INPUTS a form needs so the Business Filing App (FF2-4) can drive its intake wizard. GENERAL INFORMATION ONLY — NOT legal or tax advice. Contains NO filled values and NO founder PII; it is a structure, not a completed form. Field VALUES are supplied by the user at intake time, validated against each field's type/required/enum, and the user makes every legal choice.

officialFormNumber.description: The official form number if any (e.g. 'IRS SS-4', 'TX SOS Form 205'). Verify it is current.

agency.description: The official agency the user files with (e.g. 'IRS', 'Texas Secretary of State'). The app generates-for-user-to-file; it does NOT submit.

category.description: Generic category for routing + compliance-calendar derivation.

fields.description: Ordered input fields the intake wizard collects from the user.

type.description: Input type. NOTE: 'ein' here is a FORMAT for a value the user types; the app never generates or stores it as identity — see FF2-1/FF2-4 PII rules.

enum.description: For type 'enum' — the neutral option list the USER chooses from. The app presents options, never recommends one.

help.description: General-information help text (what the field means / where the official instruction lives). NOT advice on the user's situation.

sensitive.description: If true, the value is PII the user supplies transiently for the document and is NOT retained beyond producing the user-owned document.
